title: UltraVision Graphics
description: FPS-friendly graphics modpack with shader support for smooth and realistic visuals.
body:
UltraVision Graphics is a lightweight and FPS-friendly graphics modpack for Minecraft Java Edition.

This modpack focuses on improving visual quality while keeping performance high. It is fully compatible with shaders and works great on both low and mid-range PCs.

Features:
- Performance optimization mods (Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, and more)
- Full shader support (recommended: Complementary Reimagined)
- Improved lighting, particles, and visual effects
- No world generation changes
- No OptiFine required

Game Version: Minecraft 1.20.1
Mod Loader: Fabric

All mods belong to their respective authors.
This modpack does not redistribute mods outside the Modrinth platform.

Credits:
Stay True Resource Pack by haimcyfly
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true
